evals.prompt: Enable fact tracking for the Kafka entity page.
evals.expected_output: An append-only facts log scaffolded for wiki/topics/kafka.md with the rebuild-from-facts pattern documented and the entity page updated to reference the facts file.

evals.prompt: Turn on fact tracking for the ERISA-compliance domain page — multiple sources are accumulating.
evals.expected_output: Same as default — fact tracking enabled for the named entity.

evals.prompt: Set up fact tracking for the vendor-evaluation page on Acme — sources will accumulate over the next quarter.
evals.expected_output: Fact tracking enabled with a clear pattern for appending observations as they arrive.
